holdings.infoBox: USPX is an equity ETF with a total of 510 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.68%, Apple at 6.70%, Microsoft at 4.57%, Amazon.com at 3.73%, and Alphabet at 3.32%.

overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Equity Index ETF (USPX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US equities, selected and weighted by market cap. USPX was launched on Jun 1, 2016 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: Morningstar US Target Market Exposure Index
